event: Sketch of the Risen Christ for convent dome decoration
symbols: golden halo — divine glory of the risen Lord
standing posture on elevated ground — Christ victorious over death, risen from the tomb
draped garment revealing wounds — the glorified body still bearing the marks of crucifixion
outstretched hand — Christ reaching toward humanity in His resurrection
description: A preparatory charcoal and colored chalk sketch on paper showing a full-length standing figure of the risen Christ. He stands on elevated ground with a golden halo, draped in flowing robes that reveal His muscular torso. One arm extends outward while the other holds the drapery. The figure is heroic in proportion and posture. The drawing is loose but powerful, with confident lines defining the anatomy and flowing garments. Warm golden tones suggest radiance around the head.
theological_description: This sketch of the risen Christ captures the moment of supreme triumph in Christian faith: death has been conquered, the tomb is empty, and Christ stands in glorified bodily form. The resurrection is not merely a spiritual idea but a physical reality — the same body that was crucified now stands, transformed but recognizable, bearing the wounds as marks of victory rather than defeat. The heroic proportions express the theological truth that in rising, Christ did not return to ordinary life but entered a new mode of existence — the firstfruits of the new creation (1 Corinthians 15:20). The outstretched hand suggests both blessing and invitation: the risen Lord offers His victory to all who believe. As a dome decoration, this image would have crowned the worship space, placing the resurrection at the apex of the church's visual theology.

scripture_refs.reason: He is not here, He has risen — the resurrection the sketch celebrates
Christ has been raised from the dead, the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep
Christ showing His wounds to Thomas — the glorified body bearing the marks of Passion
He will transform our lowly body to be like His glorious body — the resurrection hope
